traveler_consultant.text: Stable profile: avoid red-eyes, protect prep evenings before meetings, prefers quiet hotel rooms over flashy design, values local character when schedule risk is low, vegan-friendly group dinners help the team.

traveler_exec.text: Stable profile: airport access usually matters, direct flights are worth a small premium, hotel noise is costly, client-facing dinners should feel polished, avoid chaotic late-night districts unless explicitly overridden.

traveler_research.text: Stable profile: low-friction transit and time to think matter, likes calm local places over touristy bustle, can accept simple meals, avoids unnecessary hotel changes once settled.

traveler_sales.text: Stable profile: values polished but calm dinners, accepts bundles if they reduce friction, prefers refundable plans when partner schedules look volatile, and dislikes carrying too many conditional notes in active context.

traveler_ops.text: Stable profile: airport access, transfer resilience, and quiet sleep matter. Will accept a chain when it meaningfully lowers operational risk, but does not want stale exceptions to rewrite the normal profile.
